mapper.select: /* SQL ID : OrgConnIpDAO.select 설 명 : 접속 IP의 정보 조회 */ SELECT ORG_ID , CNTN_PRM_IP , USEYN , BAND_CHKYN , RGTR_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER_PRFIL WHERE USER_PRFIL_ID = RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM , REG_DTTM , MDFR_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER_PRFIL WHERE USER_PRFIL_ID = MDFR_ID) AS MOD_NM , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_ORG_CNTN_PRM_IP WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND CNTN_PRM_IP = #{connIp}
